headline: 50 Facts And Figures About Elon Musk On His 50th Birthday
summary:
One of the world’s most well-known CEOs, Elon Reeve Musk was born June 28, 1971, in South Africa and is celebrating his 50th birthday in 2021.

Here is a look at 50 facts and figures about Musk in honor of this milestone birthday.
